industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Huayi Electric Company Limited
summary: Huayi Electric Company Limited primarily operates in the electric equipment industry in China and internationally. It produces wind turbine generator systems; outdoor circuit breakers, automatic circuit sectionalizers and reclosers, outdoor load break switches, outdoor disconnect switches, and power transformers; MV and LV switchgears and compact substations; medium voltage switches; low voltage apparatus; meters and relays; current and potential transformers; and power lines and accessories. The company also engages in the measurement and evaluation of wind resources; constructing and operating wind farm projects; and provision of technical advisory services on wind farm construction and operations. In addition, it is involved in the sewage treatment and ecological remediation of contaminated soil, atmospheric environment, solid waste disposal, and ecological engineering and environmental businesses, as well as operates as a small loan company. The company is headquartered in Yueqing, China. Huayi Electric Company Limited is a subsidiary of Huayi Group. Co., Ltd.
